title: Pan Seared Smoky Mexican Chicken Breasts Fajitas
description: A smoky and flavorful Mexican dish featuring chicken breasts, infused oil, and Mediterranean-friendly ingredients, served in individual mini cocottes as fajitas.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the chicken breasts with smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat and sear the chicken breasts for 5 minutes per side.
Transfer the chicken breasts to the oven and bake for 15 minutes or until cooked through.
In the same skillet, add the lime juice, garlic, onion, and bell peppers, and cook for 5 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
Add the fajita seasoning to the skillet and stir to combine.
Slice the cooked chicken breasts into thin strips and add to the skillet.
Serve the chicken and vegetables in individual mini cocottes with warm flour tortillas.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve immediately.
